case_title: NORTHERN CALIFORNIA COLLECTION SERVICE, INC VS. TDG INTERIORS INC. A CALIFORNIA CORPORAITON DBA ET AL

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR SEP-10-2019 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF SEP-10-2019 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 100061392) FILED BY PLAINTIFF NORTHERN CALIFORNIA  COLLECTION SERVICE, INC AS TO DEFENDANT TDG INTERIORS, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION DBA THE DRYWALL GUYS DOES ONE THROUGH TEN

DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE EACH PARTY TO BEAR THEIR OWN COSTS (TRANSACTION ID # 100082258)
